heading: Reservation of right to amend or repeal
label: 300113 Reservation of right to amend or repeal
text: Congress reserves the right to amend or repeal the provisions of this chapter.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)30011136:8, .Jan. 5, 1905, ch. 23, § 733 Stat. 602
